title: Survival + Quality of Life Modpack
description: Many mods primarily performance mods with some extra mods to help you and make survival that slight bit more easier.
body:
# Survival + Quality of Life Modpack
![This is a picture in game taken with complementary shaders](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1020383154382569514/1164356864432152667/image.png?ex=6542ead5&is=653075d5&hm=713020802251c5ef753c7d69f9bea641dc451e3f09a6f7462a479bf99fdc6c0c&)

---

## What does this mod pack do?

- This modpack
    - contains mods that make Minecraft easier for the player or make it more relaxed as you don't have to put in as much work.
    - has many optimization mods which help make Minecraft run smoother and better.
    - aims to give a better experience to players.
---

## Version:
- 1.20.1
